content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter Daily Update (Apr 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 25, 2026, focused on improving cross-platform compatibility by resolving file system conflicts related to PGlite database artifacts.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Environment Compatibility Improvements
*   Resolved issues blocking Windows git checkouts by removing accidentally committed PGlite in-memory database directories that contained incompatible colon characters in their file paths.
*   Updated `.gitignore` to prevent similar PGlite artifacts from being committed in the future.
*   Relevant PR: [#25](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter/pull/25)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
